name: mindrian-marketplace
description: MindrianOS - Your AI innovation co-founder. Stop thinking alone.

plugins.name: mos
plugins.description: 49 commands, 7 agents, auto-organizing Data Room, meeting intelligence, embedded knowledge graph (KuzuDB LazyGraph), team room, MCP server for Desktop/Cowork, Brain hosting, Opportunity Bank, Funding Room, AI Team Personas. Two-graph architecture: Brain (methodology) + Room Graph (venture data). Larry -- modeled on the inventor of PWS methodology -- thinks with you through venture innovation.
